zh.Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可可諾迪沙拉爾 煙雨 布可洛福
zh.Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴根斯索普
zh.of, Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴根斯索普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Jenny於1433年出生在英國素福爾可可諾迪沙拉爾 煙雨 布可洛福時，她的父親John Jenney35歲，母親Maud Bokill33歲。她於大約1446年與Thomas Bacon在英國素福爾可可諾迪沙拉爾 煙雨 布可洛福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1470年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴根斯索普享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Jenny于1433年出生在英国素福爾可可諾迪沙拉爾 煙雨 布可洛福时，她的父亲John Jenney35岁，母亲Maud Bokill33岁。她于大约1446年与Thomas Bacon在英国素福爾可可諾迪沙拉爾 煙雨 布可洛福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1470年在英国英格兰諾福爾可巴根斯索普享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jenny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Dietrich, Otto.
Swiss German and Alsatian: from a pet form of Jähn, Swiss German and Alsatian form of the personal name Johannes (see John ).
English: from a pet form of the Middle English personal name Jen (from Jehan; see Jean and John ).

variants.name: Johannes
meanings: German and Dutch: from the personal name Johannes (see John ).

variants.name: Jenney
meanings: Altered form of German   Jenny  , or perhaps of   Jenne  .

variants.name: Jenni
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Markus.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Jenny was born in 1433, in Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England, her father, John Jenney, was 35 and her mother, Maud Bokill, was 33. She married Thomas Bacon about 1446, in Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. She died about 1470, in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Jenny est née en 1433, à Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Jenney, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Maud Bokill, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bacon environ 1446, à Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1470, à Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Jenny 1433 in Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Jenney 35 und ihre Mutter Maud Bokill 33. Sie hat um 1446 in Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England Thomas Bacon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Sie starb um 1470 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Jenny è nata il nel 1433 nel Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Jenney, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Maud Bokill, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Bacon circa 1446, nel Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì circa 1470, nel Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Jennyが1433年にイギリススフォルクノディシャル ウィス ブクスロウで生まれた時，父John Jenneyは35歳，母Maud Bokillは33歳であった。約1446年にイギリススフォルクノディシャル ウィス ブクスロウでThomas Baconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1470年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクバコンスソルペで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Jenny(이)가 1433년 영국 수폴크 노디샤 위스 버스로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Jenney(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Bokill(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1446년 영국 수폴크 노디샤 위스 버스로에서 Thomas Bacon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 바콘스소에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Jenny nasceu em 1433, em Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Jenney, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Maud Bokill, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bacon aproximadamente 1446, em Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1470, em Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Jenny родилась в 1433 г. в местности нодишолл вит букслоу, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Jenney было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Bokill, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bacon около 1446 г. в местности нодишолл вит букслоу, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Она умерла около 1470 г. в местности бакунстаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.

sm.between 1455 and 1470: mai le 1455 e o'o I le 1470

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Jenny nació en 1433, en Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Jenney, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Maud Bokill, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Thomas Bacon aproximadamente 1446, en Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1470, en Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años.
